name: Scrap-Iron Statue
name_jp: くず<ruby lang="jp"><rb>鉄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>像</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぞう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When a Spell/Trap Card that is already face-up on your opponent's field activates its effect: Destroy that card, also, after that, Set this card face-down instead of sending it to the GY. If this card is sent to the GY: You can target 1 "Junk" monster in your GY; Special Summon it in Defense Position. You can only use each effect of "Scrap-Iron Statue" once per turn.
eff: When a Spell/Trap Card that is already face-up on your opponent's field activates its effect: Destroy that card, also, after that, Set this card face-down instead of sending it to the GY. If this card is sent to the GY: You can target 1 "Junk" monster in your GY; Special Summon it in Defense Position. You can only use each effect of "Scrap-Iron Statue" once per turn.

action: Sets face-up cards in your Spell & Trap Zone
mst: Destroys your opponent's face-up Spell Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-up Trap Cards
